reasoning: The betting odds for Eurovision 2025 list Montenegro's candidate (Nina Žižić) as having approximately a 0.3% implied probability of winning, placing them near the very bottom of the 37 competing countries. Pundits and fans uniformly predict the entry will struggle to even qualify for the grand final. Given this near-zero market consensus and lack of any fundamental reason to expect a massive polling error in Montenegro's favor, the probability of them winning the entire contest is constrained to the lowest possible bound for this forecasting system.
